narrative: Germany's June preliminary CPI easing to +2.3% y/y vs +2.6% expected drives EUR/USD lower; dollar firms as stocks hold gains, gold higher +0.15%; equities +1.18%; DXY +0.28%; VIX 17.4. ECB's Wunsch says might need another rate hike but not in July, adding to Eurozone growth concerns. Watch US JOLTs Job Openings at 14:00 UTC.
